untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders Top pattern detection requires multi-bar candlestick pattern recognition (shoulder-head-shoulder formation identification) which is not available in the indicator set. The signal specifies exact pattern structure detection, formation location relative to 12-month lows, and pattern completion timing that cannot be expressed as simple indicator crossovers or threshold comparisons. Entry conditions reference pattern formation near yearly extremes (L/C/H positions) and 2-day formation-to-breakout timing, which require pattern matching logic not available in allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy conditions using Donchian Channel (pattern near extremes) and price below 200-day SMA (bearish context), but this significantly oversimplifies the Head-and-Shoulders Top pattern logic. Throwback characteristics (54-65% occurrence, 11-15 day reversion) also cannot be modeled with available indicators. Exit condition set to simple reversal (close above previous close) as author did not specify exit rules. Signal requires dedicated pattern recognition algorithm.
